title: T.Forrest British Roasted Beef Knuckle Bones for Dogs (12 Pack) - 100% Natural, Long Lasting, Grain Free Dog Treats
features: 100% Natural & UK Made - Healthy dried dog treats with no additives or artificial ingredients. Our premium roast knuckles are locally produced in the UK, so you can treat your dog safely and with peace of mind.
Single-Ingredient Beef Chews - Made from 100% natural beef with no preservatives or additives. A healthy, tasty treat that dogs love to chew.
Super Meaty & Irresistible - Slowly roasted to perfection, these knuckles are packed with real meat, marrow, and trimmings. Their rich, meaty aroma makes them a treat dogs can’t resist.
Gluten & Grain Free - Hypoallergenic, high-protein roasted knuckles that are gentle on sensitive tummies. A natural, easily digestible treat perfect for dogs with dietary sensitivities
Long-Lasting Boredom Buster - These roasted knuckles double as a tasty treat and a durable chew toy. Perfect for keeping your dog entertained, occupied, and happy for longer.
